codes.term: Neovascular glaucoma due to diabetes mellitus type 2 (disorder)
codes.rationale: Neovascular glaucoma due to diabetes mellitus type 2 is a complication of diabetes; the term does not contain 'diabetes mellitus' as a diagnostic confirmation and represents a downstream manifestation.

codes.term: Neovascular glaucoma due to diabetes mellitus type 1 (disorder)
codes.rationale: Neovascular glaucoma due to diabetes mellitus type 1 is a complication of diabetes; the term does not contain 'diabetes mellitus' as a diagnostic confirmation and represents a downstream manifestation.

codes.term: Neurotrophic keratitis due to diabetes mellitus (disorder)
codes.rationale: Neurotrophic keratitis due to diabetes mellitus is a complication of diabetes; the term does not contain 'diabetes mellitus' as a diagnostic confirmation and represents a downstream manifestation.

codes.term: Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus (disorder)
codes.rationale: Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus is a complication of diabetes; the term does not contain 'diabetes mellitus' as a diagnostic confirmation and represents a downstream manifestation.

codes.term: Peripheral angiopathy due to diabetes mellitus (disorder)
codes.rationale: Peripheral angiopathy due to diabetes mellitus is a complication of diabetes; the term does not contain 'diabetes mellitus' as a diagnostic confirmation and represents a downstream manifestation.

codes.term: Type I diabetes mellitus with ulcer (disorder)
codes.rationale: Type I diabetes mellitus with ulcer is a complication of diabetes; the term does not contain 'diabetes mellitus' as a diagnostic confirmation and represents a downstream manifestation.

codes.term: Type I diabetes mellitus with gangrene
codes.rationale: Type I diabetes mellitus with gangrene is a complication of diabetes; the term does not contain 'diabetes mellitus' as a diagnostic confirmation and represents a downstream manifestation.

codes.term: Multiple complications due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
codes.rationale: Multiple complications due to type 2 diabetes mellitus describes complications rather than an instance of diabetes itself.

codes.term: Type II diabetes mellitus with ulcer (disorder)
codes.rationale: Type II diabetes mellitus with ulcer is a complication of diabetes; the term does not contain 'diabetes mellitus' as a diagnostic confirmation and represents a downstream manifestation.

codes.term: Type II diabetes mellitus with gangrene
codes.rationale: Type II diabetes mellitus with gangrene is a complication of diabetes; the term does not contain 'diabetes mellitus' as a diagnostic confirmation and represents a downstream manifestation.

codes.term: Secondary endocrine diabetes mellitus (disorder)
codes.rationale: Secondary endocrine diabetes mellitus is a distinct etiology (secondary diabetes) rather than primary diabetes mellitus as specified in the query.

codes.term: Diabetes mellitus caused by non-steroid drugs (disorder)
codes.rationale: Diabetes mellitus caused by non-steroid drugs is drug-induced (secondary) diabetes, not primary diabetes mellitus as specified in the query.

codes.term: Diabetes mellitus caused by non-steroid drugs without complication (disorder)
